tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Search Flevy's marketplace of consulting frameworks, PowerPoint templates, Excel financial models, business toolkits, and management case studies. Use this whenever a user needs a best-practice framework, methodology, template, financial model, or real-world case example on any business or managemen

tools.name: get_content_details
tools.description: Full metadata for one Flevy item, by content_id from search_content (e.g. "doc-1234" or "case-567"). Documents return the author with their credentials (headline, bio, LinkedIn, profile URL; pass the author name to search_content's author filter to list more of their documents), full description, ed

tools.name: get_slide_deep_dive
tools.description: Slide-by-slide preview of a Flevy document (a "doc-<n>" content_id). Returns every showcased slide with its name, a text description of what the slide contains (you cannot see the image, so use the description), a preview image URL, and a deep link to that slide on flevy.com. Use when a user wants t

tools.name: get_topic_details
tools.description: An end-to-end overview of one management topic: its definition, an in-depth explanation of the discipline, the 3 editor-curated top documents, all known aliases, document and case study counts, related topics, and the topic page URL. Use this to survey a discipline before going deep — e.g. "what doe

tools.name: list_topics
tools.description: The canonical list of management topics Flevy's catalog is organized under, each with its known aliases (e.g. "Digital Transformation" and "Digital Transformation Strategy" may be the same topic) and content counts. Use this to map a user's phrasing to the exact topic filter accepted by search_conte

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_content_details" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Full metadata for one Flevy item, by content_id from search_content (e.g. "doc-1234" or "case-567"). Documents return the author with their credentials (headlin…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_content_details, get_slide_deep_dive, get_topic_details · Private data: search_content, get_content_details, get_slide_deep_dive, get_topic_details · Public sink: get_content_details.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_content_details, get_slide_deep_dive, get_topic_details · Private data: search_content, get_content_details, get_slide_deep_dive, get_topic_details · Public sink: get_content_details

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
